41	
42	_MONEY = Decimal("0.01")
43	_EXCHANGE_ERROR_STREAKS: dict[str, int] = {}
44	
45	
46	@dataclass(frozen=True)
47	class GateContext:
48	    live_trading_enabled: bool
49	    polymarket_configured: bool
50	    kalshi_configured: bool
51	    max_stake_usd: float
52	    max_daily_loss_usd: float
53	    kill_switch_engaged: bool
54	    daily_loss_usd: float
55	    live_balance_usd: float
56	
57	
58	@dataclass(frozen=True)
59	class GateResult:
60	    gate_name: str
61	    passed: bool
62	    reason: str
63	    code: GateFailureCode | None = None
64	
65	
66	if "GateFailure" not in globals():
67	
68	    class GateFailure(Exception):
69	        code: GateFailureCode
70	        detail: str
71	
72	        def __init__(self, code: GateFailureCode, detail: str) -> None:
73	            self.code = code
74	            self.detail = detail
75	            super().__init__(f"{code}: {detail}")
76	
77	
78	def gate_context_from_env(state: ForecastPortfolioState | None) -> GateContext:
79	    """Build the live gate context from environment and portfolio state."""
80	
81	    return GateContext(
82	        live_trading_enabled=(
83	            os.getenv("FORECASTS_LIVE_TRADING_ENABLED", "").strip().lower()
84	            == "true"
85	        ),
86	        polymarket_configured=bool(os.getenv("POLYMARKET_PRIVATE_KEY", "").strip()),
87	        kalshi_configured=bool(
88	            os.getenv("KALSHI_API_KEY_ID", "").strip()
89	            and _kalshi_private_key_from_env()
90	        ),
91	        max_stake_usd=_env_float("FORECASTS_MAX_STAKE_USD", 0.0),
92	        max_daily_loss_usd=_env_float("FORECASTS_MAX_DAILY_LOSS_USD", 0.0),
93	        kill_switch_engaged=bool(state.kill_switch_engaged) if state else False,
94	        daily_loss_usd=float(state.daily_loss_usd) if state else 0.0,
95	        live_balance_usd=float(state.live_balance_usd or Decimal("0.00"))
96	        if state
97	        else 0.0,
98	    )
99	
100	
101	def current_trading_mode() -> str:
102	    """Return the import-time trading posture for structured startup logging."""
103	
104	    live_enabled = (
105	        os.getenv("FORECASTS_LIVE_TRADING_ENABLED", "").strip().lower() == "true"
106	    )
107	    if not live_enabled:
108	        return "PAPER_ONLY"
109	    kalshi_configured = (
110	        os.getenv("KALSHI_API_KEY_ID", "").strip()
111	        and _kalshi_private_key_from_env()
112	    )
113	    if not (os.getenv("POLYMARKET_PRIVATE_KEY", "").strip() or kalshi_configured):
114	        return "LIVE_DISABLED_NO_CREDENTIALS"
115	    return "LIVE_ENABLED_AWAITING_AUTHORIZATION"
116	
117	
118	def check_all_gates(*, prediction: Any, bet: Any, ctx: GateContext) -> None:
119	    """Raises GateFailure on the first failing gate.
120	
121	    The order is the safety contract order. Do not reorder these checks without
122	    changing the contract and tests at the same time.
123	    """
124	
125	    for result in evaluate_gate_results(prediction=prediction, bet=bet, ctx=ctx):
126	        if result.passed:
127	            continue
128	        exc = GateFailure(result.code or "NOT_CONFIGURED", result.reason)
129	        _log_gate_failure(exc, prediction=prediction, bet=bet)
130	        raise exc
131	
132	
133	def evaluate_gate_results(*, prediction: Any, bet: Any, ctx: GateContext) -> list[GateResult]:
134	    """Return all eight live-trading gate results in the check_all_gates order."""
135	
136	    results: list[GateResult] = []
137	
138	    results.append(
139	        GateResult(
140	            gate_name="live_trading_enabled",
141	            passed=ctx.live_trading_enabled,
142	            reason=(
143	                "FORECASTS_LIVE_TRADING_ENABLED=true"
144	                if ctx.live_trading_enabled
145	                else "live trading env flag is not true"
146	            ),
147	            code=None if ctx.live_trading_enabled else "DISABLED",
148	        )
149	    )
150	
151	    exchange = _enum_value(getattr(bet, "exchange", ""))
152	    if exchange == "POLYMARKET":
153	        configured = ctx.polymarket_configured
154	    elif exchange == "KALSHI":
155	        configured = ctx.kalshi_configured
156	    else:
157	        configured = False
158	    results.append(
159	        GateResult(
160	            gate_name="exchange_credentials_configured",
161	            passed=configured,
162	            reason=(
163	                f"live credentials are configured for exchange={exchange}"
164	                if configured
165	                else "live credentials are not configured for "
166	                f"exchange={exchange or '<unset>'}"
167	            ),
168	            code=None if configured else "NOT_CONFIGURED",
169	        )
170	    )
171	
172	    authorized = getattr(prediction, "live_authorized_at", None) is not None
173	    results.append(
174	        GateResult(
175	            gate_name="prediction_live_authorized",
176	            passed=authorized,
177	            reason=(
178	                "parent prediction has live_authorized_at"
179	                if authorized
180	                else "parent prediction has no live_authorized_at timestamp"
181	            ),
182	            code=None if authorized else "NOT_AUTHORIZED",
183	        )
184	    )
185	
186	    confirmed = _enum_value(getattr(bet, "status", "")) == "CONFIRMED" and getattr(
187	        bet,
188	        "confirmed_at",
189	        None,
190	    ) is not None
191	    results.append(
192	        GateResult(
193	            gate_name="operator_confirmation",
194	            passed=confirmed,
195	            reason=(
196	                "bet completed per-bet operator confirmation"
197	                if confirmed
198	                else "bet has not completed the per-bet operator confirmation"
199	            ),
200	            code=None if confirmed else "NOT_CONFIRMED",
201	        )
202	    )
203	
204	    stake = _decimal(getattr(bet, "stake_usd", Decimal("0.00")))
205	    max_stake = _decimal(ctx.max_stake_usd)
206	    stake_ok = stake <= max_stake
207	    results.append(
208	        GateResult(
209	            gate_name="stake_ceiling",
210	            passed=stake_ok,
211	            reason=(
212	                f"stake_usd={stake} is within max_stake_usd={max_stake}"
213	                if stake_ok
214	                else f"stake_usd={stake} exceeds max_stake_usd={max_stake}"
215	            ),
216	            code=None if stake_ok else "STAKE_OVER_CEILING",
217	        )
218	    )
219	
220	    daily_loss = _decimal(ctx.daily_loss_usd)
221	    max_daily_loss = _decimal(ctx.max_daily_loss_usd)
222	    daily_loss_ok = daily_loss <= max_daily_loss
223	    results.append(
224	        GateResult(
225	            gate_name="daily_loss_ceiling",
226	            passed=daily_loss_ok,
227	            reason=(
228	                f"daily_loss_usd={daily_loss} is within max_daily_loss_usd={max_daily_loss}"
229	                if daily_loss_ok
230	                else f"daily_loss_usd={daily_loss} exceeds max_daily_loss_usd={max_daily_loss}"
231	            ),
232	            code=None if daily_loss_ok else "DAILY_LOSS_OVER_CEILING",
233	        )
234	    )
235	
236	    results.append(
237	        GateResult(
238	            gate_name="kill_switch_clear",
239	            passed=not ctx.kill_switch_engaged,
240	            reason=(
241	                "portfolio kill switch is clear"
242	                if not ctx.kill_switch_engaged
243	                else "portfolio kill switch is engaged"
244	            ),
245	            code=None if not ctx.kill_switch_engaged else "KILL_SWITCH_ENGAGED",
246	        )
247	    )
248	
249	    live_balance = _decimal(ctx.live_balance_usd)
250	    balance_ok = live_balance >= stake
251	    results.append(
252	        GateResult(
253	            gate_name="sufficient_live_balance",
254	            passed=balance_ok,
255	            reason=(
256	                f"live_balance_usd={live_balance} covers stake_usd={stake}"
257	                if balance_ok
258	                else f"live_balance_usd={live_balance} is below stake_usd={stake}"
259	            ),
260	            code=None if balance_ok else "INSUFFICIENT_BALANCE",
261	        )
262	    )
263	
264	    return results
265	
266	
267	def engage_kill_switch(
268	    store: Any,
269	    organization_id: str,
270	    *,
271	    reason: str,
272	    engaged_at: datetime | None = None,
273	) -> None:
274	    timestamp = _aware_utc(engaged_at or datetime.now(UTC))
275	    with store.session() as session:
276	        state = _portfolio_state(session, organization_id, now=timestamp)
277	        state.kill_switch_engaged = True
278	        state.kill_switch_reason = reason
279	        state.updated_at = timestamp
280	        session.add(state)
281	        session.commit()
282	    log.warning(
283	        "forecast_live_kill_switch_engaged",
284	        organization_id=organization_id,
285	        reason=reason,
286	        engaged_at=timestamp.isoformat(),
287	    )
288	
289	
290	def disengage_kill_switch(
291	    store: Any,
292	    organization_id: str,
293	    *,
294	    operator_id: str,
295	    note: str = "",
296	) -> None:
297	    if not operator_id or not operator_id.strip():
298	        raise ValueError("operator_id is required to disengage the kill switch")
299	    if len(note.strip()) < 20:
300	        raise ValueError("kill switch disengagement note must be at least 20 chars")
301	    timestamp = datetime.now(UTC)
302	    with store.session() as session:
303	        state = _portfolio_state(session, organization_id, now=timestamp)
304	        state.kill_switch_engaged = False
305	        state.kill_switch_reason = None
306	        state.updated_at = timestamp
307	        session.add(state)
308	        session.commit()
309	    log.warning(
310	        "forecast_live_kill_switch_disengaged",
311	        organization_id=organization_id,
312	        operator_id=operator_id,
313	        note=note.strip(),
314	        disengaged_at=timestamp.isoformat(),
315	    )
316	
317	
318	def daily_loss_auto_engagement_reason(
319	    state: ForecastPortfolioState | None,
320	    *,
321	    threshold_usd: Decimal | None = None,
322	) -> KillSwitchReason | None:
323	    if state is None:
324	        return None
325	    threshold = (
326	        threshold_usd
327	        if threshold_usd is not None
328	        else _env_decimal("FORECASTS_KILL_SWITCH_AUTO_THRESHOLD_USD", Decimal("0"))
329	    )
330	    if threshold <= Decimal("0"):
331	        return None
332	    return (
333	        "DAILY_LOSS_THRESHOLD"
334	        if Decimal(state.daily_loss_usd) >= threshold
335	        else None
336	    )
337	
338	
339	def exchange_error_streak_reason(
340	    organization_id: str,
341	    *,
342	    threshold: int = 3,
343	) -> KillSwitchReason | None:
344	    return (
345	        "EXCHANGE_ERROR_STREAK"
346	        if _EXCHANGE_ERROR_STREAKS.get(organization_id, 0) >= threshold
347	        else None
348	    )
349	
350	
351	def calibration_degraded_reason(
352	    resolutions: Sequence[ForecastResolution],
353	    *,
354	    window: int = 50,
355	    max_mean_brier: float = 0.30,
356	) -> KillSwitchReason | None:
357	    scored = [r for r in resolutions[:window] if r.brier_score is not None]
358	    if len(scored) < window:
359	        return None
360	    mean_brier = sum(float(r.brier_score) for r in scored) / len(scored)
361	    return "CALIBRATION_DEGRADED" if mean_brier > max_mean_brier else None
362	
363	
364	def maybe_engage_daily_loss_kill_switch(
365	    store: Any,
366	    organization_id: str,
367	    *,
368	    state: ForecastPortfolioState | None = None,
369	) -> bool:
370	    state = state or store.get_portfolio_state(organization_id)
371	    reason = daily_loss_auto_engagement_reason(state)
372	    if reason is None:
373	        return False
374	    engage_kill_switch(store, organization_id, reason=reason)
375	    return True
376	
377	
378	def maybe_engage_calibration_kill_switch(store: Any, organization_id: str) -> bool:
379	    with store.session() as session:
380	        resolutions = list(
381	            session.exec(
382	                select(ForecastResolution)
383	                .where(ForecastResolution.brier_score.is_not(None))
384	                .order_by(desc(ForecastResolution.resolved_at))
385	                .limit(50)
386	            ).all()
387	        )
388	    reason = calibration_degraded_reason(resolutions)
389	    if reason is None:
390	        return False
391	    engage_kill_switch(store, organization_id, reason=reason)
392	    return True
393	
394	
395	def record_exchange_error(store: Any, organization_id: str) -> int:
396	    streak = _EXCHANGE_ERROR_STREAKS.get(organization_id, 0) + 1
397	    _EXCHANGE_ERROR_STREAKS[organization_id] = streak
398	    if exchange_error_streak_reason(organization_id) is not None:
399	        engage_kill_switch(store, organization_id, reason="EXCHANGE_ERROR_STREAK")
400	    return streak
401	
402	
403	def reset_exchange_error_streak(organization_id: str) -> None:
404	    _EXCHANGE_ERROR_STREAKS.pop(organization_id, None)
405	
406	
407	def _portfolio_state(
408	    session: Any,
409	    organization_id: str,
410	    *,
411	    now: datetime,
412	) -> ForecastPortfolioState:
413	    state = session.exec(
414	        select(ForecastPortfolioState).where(
415	            ForecastPortfolioState.organization_id == organization_id
416	        )
417	    ).first()
418	    if state is not None:
419	        return state
420	    state = ForecastPortfolioState(
421	        organization_id=organization_id,
422	        paper_balance_usd=Decimal("0.00"),
423	        live_balance_usd=Decimal("0.00"),
424	        daily_loss_usd=Decimal("0.00"),
425	        daily_loss_reset_at=now,
426	        kill_switch_engaged=False,
427	        kill_switch_reason=None,
428	        updated_at=now,
429	    )
430	    session.add(state)
431	    session.flush()
432	    return state
433	
434	
435	def _log_gate_failure(exc: GateFailure, *, prediction: Any, bet: Any) -> None:
436	    log.warning(
437	        "forecast_live_bet_gate_blocked",
438	        gate_code=exc.code,
439	        detail=exc.detail,
440	        prediction_id=getattr(prediction, "id", None),
441	        bet_id=getattr(bet, "id", None),
442	        organization_id=getattr(bet, "organization_id", None),
443	        exchange=_enum_value(getattr(bet, "exchange", "")),
444	    )
445	
446	
447	def _kalshi_private_key_from_env() -> str:
448	    return (
449	        os.getenv("KALSHI_API_PRIVATE_KEY", "").replace("\\n", "\n").strip()
450	        or os.getenv("KALSHI_PRIVATE_KEY_PEM", "").replace("\\n", "\n").strip()
451	    )
452	
453	
454	def _env_float(key: str, default: float) -> float:
455	    raw = os.getenv(key)
456	    if raw is None or not raw.strip():
457	        return default
458	    return float(raw.strip())
459	
460	
461	def _env_decimal(key: str, default: Decimal) -> Decimal:
462	    raw = os.getenv(key)
463	    if raw is None or not raw.strip():
464	        return default
465	    return _decimal(raw.strip())
466	
467	
468	def _decimal(value: Any) -> Decimal:
469	    try:
470	        return Decimal(str(value))
471	    except (InvalidOperation, ValueError, TypeError) as exc:
472	        raise ValueError(f"not a decimal value: {value!r}") from exc
473	
474	
475	def _aware_utc(value: datetime) -> datetime:
476	    if value.tzinfo is None:
477	        return value.replace(tzinfo=UTC)
478	    return value.astimezone(UTC)
479	
480	
481	def _enum_value(value: Any) -> str:
482	    return str(value.value if hasattr(value, "value") else value)
483

"""Live-trading safety gates for Forecasts.

Live submission is intentionally a narrow, explicit path. Failing a gate is
normal control flow: the attempt is blocked and logged, but the emergency kill
switch is not engaged unless an auto-engagement detector fires separately.
"""

from __future__ import annotations

import os
from collections.abc import Sequence
from dataclasses import dataclass
from datetime import UTC, datetime
from decimal import Decimal, InvalidOperation
from typing import Any, Literal

from sqlmodel import desc, select

from noosphere.models import ForecastPortfolioState, ForecastResolution
from noosphere.observability import get_logger

log = get_logger(__name__)

GateFailureCode = Literal[
    "DISABLED",
    "NOT_CONFIGURED",
    "NOT_AUTHORIZED",
    "NOT_CONFIRMED",
    "STAKE_OVER_CEILING",
    "DAILY_LOSS_OVER_CEILING",
    "KILL_SWITCH_ENGAGED",
    "INSUFFICIENT_BALANCE",
]

KillSwitchReason = Literal[
    "DAILY_LOSS_THRESHOLD",
    "EXCHANGE_ERROR_STREAK",
    "CALIBRATION_DEGRADED",
    "OPERATOR",
]

_MONEY = Decimal("0.01")
_EXCHANGE_ERROR_STREAKS: dict[str, int] = {}


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class GateContext:
    live_trading_enabled: bool
    polymarket_configured: bool
    kalshi_configured: bool
    max_stake_usd: float
    max_daily_loss_usd: float
    kill_switch_engaged: bool
    daily_loss_usd: float
    live_balance_usd: float


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class GateResult:
    gate_name: str
    passed: bool
    reason: str
    code: GateFailureCode | None = None


if "GateFailure" not in globals():

    class GateFailure(Exception):
        code: GateFailureCode
        detail: str

        def __init__(self, code: GateFailureCode, detail: str) -> None:
            self.code = code
            self.detail = detail
            super().__init__(f"{code}: {detail}")


def gate_context_from_env(state: ForecastPortfolioState | None) -> GateContext:
    """Build the live gate context from environment and portfolio state."""

    return GateContext(
        live_trading_enabled=(
            os.getenv("FORECASTS_LIVE_TRADING_ENABLED", "").strip().lower()
            == "true"
        ),
        polymarket_configured=bool(os.getenv("POLYMARKET_PRIVATE_KEY", "").strip()),
        kalshi_configured=bool(
            os.getenv("KALSHI_API_KEY_ID", "").strip()
            and _kalshi_private_key_from_env()
        ),
        max_stake_usd=_env_float("FORECASTS_MAX_STAKE_USD", 0.0),
        max_daily_loss_usd=_env_float("FORECASTS_MAX_DAILY_LOSS_USD", 0.0),
        kill_switch_engaged=bool(state.kill_switch_engaged) if state else False,
        daily_loss_usd=float(state.daily_loss_usd) if state else 0.0,
        live_balance_usd=float(state.live_balance_usd or Decimal("0.00"))
        if state
        else 0.0,
    )


def current_trading_mode() -> str:
    """Return the import-time trading posture for structured startup logging."""

    live_enabled = (
        os.getenv("FORECASTS_LIVE_TRADING_ENABLED", "").strip().lower() == "true"
    )
    if not live_enabled:
        return "PAPER_ONLY"
    kalshi_configured = (
        os.getenv("KALSHI_API_KEY_ID", "").strip()
        and _kalshi_private_key_from_env()
    )
    if not (os.getenv("POLYMARKET_PRIVATE_KEY", "").strip() or kalshi_configured):
        return "LIVE_DISABLED_NO_CREDENTIALS"
    return "LIVE_ENABLED_AWAITING_AUTHORIZATION"


def check_all_gates(*, prediction: Any, bet: Any, ctx: GateContext) -> None:
    """Raises GateFailure on the first failing gate.

    The order is the safety contract order. Do not reorder these checks without
    changing the contract and tests at the same time.
    """

    for result in evaluate_gate_results(prediction=prediction, bet=bet, ctx=ctx):
        if result.passed:
            continue
        exc = GateFailure(result.code or "NOT_CONFIGURED", result.reason)
        _log_gate_failure(exc, prediction=prediction, bet=bet)
        raise exc


def evaluate_gate_results(*, prediction: Any, bet: Any, ctx: GateContext) -> list[GateResult]:
    """Return all eight live-trading gate results in the check_all_gates order."""

    results: list[GateResult] = []

    results.append(
        GateResult(
            gate_name="live_trading_enabled",
            passed=ctx.live_trading_enabled,
            reason=(
                "FORECASTS_LIVE_TRADING_ENABLED=true"
                if ctx.live_trading_enabled
                else "live trading env flag is not true"
            ),
            code=None if ctx.live_trading_enabled else "DISABLED",
        )
    )

    exchange = _enum_value(getattr(bet, "exchange", ""))
    if exchange == "POLYMARKET":
        configured = ctx.polymarket_configured
    elif exchange == "KALSHI":
        configured = ctx.kalshi_configured
    else:
        configured = False
    results.append(
        GateResult(
            gate_name="exchange_credentials_configured",
            passed=configured,
            reason=(
                f"live credentials are configured for exchange={exchange}"
                if configured
                else "live credentials are not configured for "
                f"exchange={exchange or '<unset>'}"
            ),
            code=None if configured else "NOT_CONFIGURED",
        )
    )

    authorized = getattr(prediction, "live_authorized_at", None) is not None
    results.append(
        GateResult(
            gate_name="prediction_live_authorized",
            passed=authorized,
            reason=(
                "parent prediction has live_authorized_at"
                if authorized
                else "parent prediction has no live_authorized_at timestamp"
            ),
            code=None if authorized else "NOT_AUTHORIZED",
        )
    )

    confirmed = _enum_value(getattr(bet, "status", "")) == "CONFIRMED" and getattr(
        bet,
        "confirmed_at",
        None,
    ) is not None
    results.append(
        GateResult(
            gate_name="operator_confirmation",
            passed=confirmed,
            reason=(
                "bet completed per-bet operator confirmation"
                if confirmed
                else "bet has not completed the per-bet operator confirmation"
            ),
            code=None if confirmed else "NOT_CONFIRMED",
        )
    )

    stake = _decimal(getattr(bet, "stake_usd", Decimal("0.00")))
    max_stake = _decimal(ctx.max_stake_usd)
    stake_ok = stake <= max_stake
    results.append(
        GateResult(
            gate_name="stake_ceiling",
            passed=stake_ok,
            reason=(
                f"stake_usd={stake} is within max_stake_usd={max_stake}"
                if stake_ok
                else f"stake_usd={stake} exceeds max_stake_usd={max_stake}"
            ),
            code=None if stake_ok else "STAKE_OVER_CEILING",
        )
    )

    daily_loss = _decimal(ctx.daily_loss_usd)
    max_daily_loss = _decimal(ctx.max_daily_loss_usd)
    daily_loss_ok = daily_loss <= max_daily_loss
    results.append(
        GateResult(
            gate_name="daily_loss_ceiling",
            passed=daily_loss_ok,
            reason=(
                f"daily_loss_usd={daily_loss} is within max_daily_loss_usd={max_daily_loss}"
                if daily_loss_ok
                else f"daily_loss_usd={daily_loss} exceeds max_daily_loss_usd={max_daily_loss}"
            ),
            code=None if daily_loss_ok else "DAILY_LOSS_OVER_CEILING",
        )
    )

    results.append(
        GateResult(
            gate_name="kill_switch_clear",
            passed=not ctx.kill_switch_engaged,
            reason=(
                "portfolio kill switch is clear"
                if not ctx.kill_switch_engaged
                else "portfolio kill switch is engaged"
            ),
            code=None if not ctx.kill_switch_engaged else "KILL_SWITCH_ENGAGED",
        )
    )

    live_balance = _decimal(ctx.live_balance_usd)
    balance_ok = live_balance >= stake
    results.append(
        GateResult(
            gate_name="sufficient_live_balance",
            passed=balance_ok,
            reason=(
                f"live_balance_usd={live_balance} covers stake_usd={stake}"
                if balance_ok
                else f"live_balance_usd={live_balance} is below stake_usd={stake}"
            ),
            code=None if balance_ok else "INSUFFICIENT_BALANCE",
        )
    )

    return results


def engage_kill_switch(
    store: Any,
    organization_id: str,
    *,
    reason: str,
    engaged_at: datetime | None = None,
) -> None:
    timestamp = _aware_utc(engaged_at or datetime.now(UTC))
    with store.session() as session:
        state = _portfolio_state(session, organization_id, now=timestamp)
        state.kill_switch_engaged = True
        state.kill_switch_reason = reason
        state.updated_at = timestamp
        session.add(state)
        session.commit()
    log.warning(
        "forecast_live_kill_switch_engaged",
        organization_id=organization_id,
        reason=reason,
        engaged_at=timestamp.isoformat(),
    )


def disengage_kill_switch(
    store: Any,
    organization_id: str,
    *,
    operator_id: str,
    note: str = "",
) -> None:
    if not operator_id or not operator_id.strip():
        raise ValueError("operator_id is required to disengage the kill switch")
    if len(note.strip()) < 20:
        raise ValueError("kill switch disengagement note must be at least 20 chars")
    timestamp = datetime.now(UTC)
    with store.session() as session:
        state = _portfolio_state(session, organization_id, now=timestamp)
        state.kill_switch_engaged = False
        state.kill_switch_reason = None
        state.updated_at = timestamp
        session.add(state)
        session.commit()
    log.warning(
        "forecast_live_kill_switch_disengaged",
        organization_id=organization_id,
        operator_id=operator_id,
        note=note.strip(),
        disengaged_at=timestamp.isoformat(),
    )


def daily_loss_auto_engagement_reason(
    state: ForecastPortfolioState | None,
    *,
    threshold_usd: Decimal | None = None,
) -> KillSwitchReason | None:
    if state is None:
        return None
    threshold = (
        threshold_usd
        if threshold_usd is not None
        else _env_decimal("FORECASTS_KILL_SWITCH_AUTO_THRESHOLD_USD", Decimal("0"))
    )
    if threshold <= Decimal("0"):
        return None
    return (
        "DAILY_LOSS_THRESHOLD"
        if Decimal(state.daily_loss_usd) >= threshold
        else None
    )


def exchange_error_streak_reason(
    organization_id: str,
    *,
    threshold: int = 3,
) -> KillSwitchReason | None:
    return (
        "EXCHANGE_ERROR_STREAK"
        if _EXCHANGE_ERROR_STREAKS.get(organization_id, 0) >= threshold
        else None
    )


def calibration_degraded_reason(
    resolutions: Sequence[ForecastResolution],
    *,
    window: int = 50,
    max_mean_brier: float = 0.30,
) -> KillSwitchReason | None:
    scored = [r for r in resolutions[:window] if r.brier_score is not None]
    if len(scored) < window:
        return None
    mean_brier = sum(float(r.brier_score) for r in scored) / len(scored)
    return "CALIBRATION_DEGRADED" if mean_brier > max_mean_brier else None


def maybe_engage_daily_loss_kill_switch(
    store: Any,
    organization_id: str,
    *,
    state: ForecastPortfolioState | None = None,
) -> bool:
    state = state or store.get_portfolio_state(organization_id)
    reason = daily_loss_auto_engagement_reason(state)
    if reason is None:
        return False
    engage_kill_switch(store, organization_id, reason=reason)
    return True


def maybe_engage_calibration_kill_switch(store: Any, organization_id: str) -> bool:
    with store.session() as session:
        resolutions = list(
            session.exec(
                select(ForecastResolution)
                .where(ForecastResolution.brier_score.is_not(None))
                .order_by(desc(ForecastResolution.resolved_at))
                .limit(50)
            ).all()
        )
    reason = calibration_degraded_reason(resolutions)
    if reason is None:
        return False
    engage_kill_switch(store, organization_id, reason=reason)
    return True


def record_exchange_error(store: Any, organization_id: str) -> int:
    streak = _EXCHANGE_ERROR_STREAKS.get(organization_id, 0) + 1
    _EXCHANGE_ERROR_STREAKS[organization_id] = streak
    if exchange_error_streak_reason(organization_id) is not None:
        engage_kill_switch(store, organization_id, reason="EXCHANGE_ERROR_STREAK")
    return streak


def reset_exchange_error_streak(organization_id: str) -> None:
    _EXCHANGE_ERROR_STREAKS.pop(organization_id, None)


def _portfolio_state(
    session: Any,
    organization_id: str,
    *,
    now: datetime,
) -> ForecastPortfolioState:
    state = session.exec(
        select(ForecastPortfolioState).where(
            ForecastPortfolioState.organization_id == organization_id
        )
    ).first()
    if state is not None:
        return state
    state = ForecastPortfolioState(
        organization_id=organization_id,
        paper_balance_usd=Decimal("0.00"),
        live_balance_usd=Decimal("0.00"),
        daily_loss_usd=Decimal("0.00"),
        daily_loss_reset_at=now,
        kill_switch_engaged=False,
        kill_switch_reason=None,
        updated_at=now,
    )
    session.add(state)
    session.flush()
    return state


def _log_gate_failure(exc: GateFailure, *, prediction: Any, bet: Any) -> None:
    log.warning(
        "forecast_live_bet_gate_blocked",
        gate_code=exc.code,
        detail=exc.detail,
        prediction_id=getattr(prediction, "id", None),
        bet_id=getattr(bet, "id", None),
        organization_id=getattr(bet, "organization_id", None),
        exchange=_enum_value(getattr(bet, "exchange", "")),
    )


def _kalshi_private_key_from_env() -> str:
    return (
        os.getenv("KALSHI_API_PRIVATE_KEY", "").replace("\\n", "\n").strip()
        or os.getenv("KALSHI_PRIVATE_KEY_PEM", "").replace("\\n", "\n").strip()
    )


def _env_float(key: str, default: float) -> float:
    raw = os.getenv(key)
    if raw is None or not raw.strip():
        return default
    return float(raw.strip())


def _env_decimal(key: str, default: Decimal) -> Decimal:
    raw = os.getenv(key)
    if raw is None or not raw.strip():
        return default
    return _decimal(raw.strip())


def _decimal(value: Any) -> Decimal:
    try:
        return Decimal(str(value))
    except (InvalidOperation, ValueError, TypeError) as exc:
        raise ValueError(f"not a decimal value: {value!r}") from exc


def _aware_utc(value: datetime) -> datetime:
    if value.tzinfo is None:
        return value.replace(tzinfo=UTC)
    return value.astimezone(UTC)


def _enum_value(value: Any) -> str:
    return str(value.value if hasattr(value, "value") else value)

1	"""Live Polymarket CLOB adapter for Forecasts.
2	
3	The Polymarket CLOB currently signs orders as EIP-712 payloads and uses L2
4	HMAC credentials for authenticated trading requests. This wrapper intentionally
5	delegates those moving parts to Polymarket's SDK when live trading is actually
6	enabled; importing this module never constructs a wallet or contacts the CLOB.
7	"""
8	
9	from __future__ import annotations
10	
11	import asyncio
12	import os
13	from decimal import Decimal, InvalidOperation
14	from typing import Any, Literal
15	
16	from pydantic import BaseModel, Field
17	
18	from noosphere.forecasts._polymarket_client import PolymarketGammaClient
19	
20	
21	class PolymarketLiveOrder(BaseModel):
22	    external_order_id: str
23	    status: str
24	    filled_size: Decimal = Decimal("0")
25	    average_price: Decimal | None = None
26	    raw_payload: dict[str, Any] = Field(default_factory=dict)
27	
28	
29	class PolymarketLiveClient(PolymarketGammaClient):
30	    """Async live-trading facade over the Polymarket CLOB SDK."""
31	
32	    def __init__(
33	        self,
34	        *,
35	        base: str = "https://clob.polymarket.com",
36	        private_key: str | None = None,
37	        chain_id: int = 137,
38	        signature_type: int = 0,
39	        funder: str | None = None,
40	        tick_size: str = "0.01",
41	        neg_risk: bool = False,
42	        timeout_s: float = 15.0,
43	    ) -> None:
44	        super().__init__(base=base, timeout_s=timeout_s)
45	        self._private_key = (
46	            private_key or os.getenv("POLYMARKET_PRIVATE_KEY", "")
47	        ).strip()
48	        self._chain_id = chain_id
49	        self._signature_type = signature_type
50	        self._funder = funder
51	        self._tick_size = tick_size
52	        self._neg_risk = neg_risk
53	        self._sdk_client: Any | None = None
54	        self.wallet_address = _wallet_address_or_none(self._private_key)
55	
56	    @classmethod
57	    def from_env(cls) -> PolymarketLiveClient:
58	        return cls(
59	            base=os.getenv("POLYMARKET_CLOB_BASE", "https://clob.polymarket.com"),
60	            private_key=os.getenv("POLYMARKET_PRIVATE_KEY", ""),
61	            chain_id=int(os.getenv("POLYMARKET_CHAIN_ID", "137")),
62	            signature_type=int(os.getenv("POLYMARKET_SIGNATURE_TYPE", "0")),
63	            funder=os.getenv("POLYMARKET_FUNDER_ADDRESS", "").strip() or None,
64	            tick_size=os.getenv("POLYMARKET_DEFAULT_TICK_SIZE", "0.01"),
65	            neg_risk=os.getenv("POLYMARKET_DEFAULT_NEG_RISK", "").strip().lower()
66	            in {"1", "true", "yes", "y"},
67	        )
68	
69	    async def place_order(
70	        self,
71	        condition_id: str,
72	        outcome_index: int,
73	        side: Literal["BUY", "SELL"],
74	        size: Decimal | float | str,
75	        price: Decimal | float | str,
76	        order_type: str,
77	    ) -> PolymarketLiveOrder:
78	        """Create, EIP-712 sign, and post an order through the CLOB SDK.
79	
80	        Polymarket's current docs describe `createAndPostOrder` /
81	        `createOrder` + `postOrder` over `tokenID`. The local market mirror
82	        stores `conditionId`; callers should pass the resolved CLOB token id
83	        when it is available and fall back to the condition id only for mocks.
84	        """
85	
86	        payload = await asyncio.to_thread(
87	            self._sdk_place_order,
88	            condition_id,
89	            outcome_index,
90	            side,
91	            size,
92	            price,
93	            order_type,
94	        )
95	        return _order_from_payload(payload)
96	
97	    async def cancel_order(self, order_id: str) -> PolymarketLiveOrder:
98	        payload = await asyncio.to_thread(self._sdk_cancel_order, order_id)
99	        return _order_from_payload(
100	            payload,
101	            fallback_order_id=order_id,
102	            fallback_status="CANCELLED",
103	        )
104	
105	    async def get_order(self, order_id: str) -> PolymarketLiveOrder:
106	        payload = await asyncio.to_thread(self._sdk_get_order, order_id)
107	        return _order_from_payload(payload, fallback_order_id=order_id)
108	
109	    def _sdk_place_order(
110	        self,
111	        token_id: str,
112	        _outcome_index: int,
113	        side: str,
114	        size: Decimal | float | str,
115	        price: Decimal | float | str,
116	        order_type: str,
117	    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
118	        client = self._ensure_sdk_client()
119	        sdk_side = _sdk_side(side)
120	        sdk_order_type = _sdk_order_type(order_type)
121	        order_args = _sdk_order_args(
122	            token_id=token_id,
123	            price=float(_decimal(price)),
124	            size=float(_decimal(size)),
125	            side=sdk_side,
126	        )
127	        options = {"tickSize": self._tick_size, "negRisk": self._neg_risk}
128	
129	        method = getattr(client, "createAndPostOrder", None) or getattr(
130	            client,
131	            "create_and_post_order",
132	            None,
133	        )
134	        if method is not None:
135	            return _payload_dict(method(order_args, options, sdk_order_type))
136	
137	        create_order = getattr(client, "createOrder", None) or getattr(
138	            client,
139	            "create_order",
140	            None,
141	        )
142	        post_order = getattr(client, "postOrder", None) or getattr(
143	            client,
144	            "post_order",
145	            None,
146	        )
147	        if create_order is None or post_order is None:
148	            raise RuntimeError(
149	                "Polymarket SDK does not expose create/post order methods expected "
150	                "by the CLOB docs"
151	            )
152	        signed_order = create_order(order_args, options)
153	        return _payload_dict(post_order(signed_order, sdk_order_type))
154	
155	    def _sdk_cancel_order(self, order_id: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
156	        client = self._ensure_sdk_client()
157	        method = getattr(client, "cancelOrder", None) or getattr(client, "cancel", None)
158	        if method is None:
159	            raise RuntimeError("Polymarket SDK does not expose cancelOrder/cancel")
160	        return _payload_dict(method(order_id))
161	
162	    def _sdk_get_order(self, order_id: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
163	        client = self._ensure_sdk_client()
164	        method = getattr(client, "getOrder", None) or getattr(client, "get_order", None)
165	        if method is None:
166	            raise RuntimeError("Polymarket SDK does not expose getOrder/get_order")
167	        return _payload_dict(method(order_id))
168	
169	    def _ensure_sdk_client(self) -> Any:
170	        if not self._private_key:
171	            raise RuntimeError("POLYMARKET_PRIVATE_KEY is required for live trading")
172	        if self._sdk_client is not None:
173	            return self._sdk_client
174	
175	        try:
176	            from py_clob_client.client import ClobClient
177	        except ImportError as exc:  # pragma: no cover - depends on optional live SDK.
178	            raise RuntimeError(
179	                "py-clob-client is required for Polymarket live trading"
180	            ) from exc
181	
182	        kwargs: dict[str, Any] = {
183	            "host": self._base,
184	            "key": self._private_key,
185	            "chain_id": self._chain_id,
186	        }
187	        if self._signature_type is not None:
188	            kwargs["signature_type"] = self._signature_type
189	        if self._funder:
190	            kwargs["funder"] = self._funder
191	        client = ClobClient(**kwargs)
192	
193	        derive = getattr(client, "create_or_derive_api_creds", None) or getattr(
194	            client,
195	            "createOrDeriveApiKey",
196	            None,
197	        )
198	        set_creds = getattr(client, "set_api_creds", None) or getattr(
199	            client,
200	            "setApiCreds",
201	            None,
202	        )
203	        if derive is not None and set_creds is not None:
204	            set_creds(derive())
205	
206	        self._sdk_client = client
207	        return client
208	
209	
210	def _wallet_address_or_none(private_key: str) -> str | None:
211	    if not private_key:
212	        return None
213	    try:
214	        from eth_account import Account
215	    except ImportError:  # pragma: no cover - optional live dependency.
216	        return None
217	    return str(Account.from_key(private_key).address)
218	
219	
220	def _sdk_order_args(*, token_id: str, price: float, size: float, side: Any) -> Any:
221	    try:
222	        from py_clob_client.clob_types import OrderArgs
223	    except ImportError:  # pragma: no cover - handled before live use.
224	        return {
225	            "tokenID": token_id,
226	            "token_id": token_id,
227	            "price": price,
228	            "size": size,
229	            "side": side,
230	        }
231	    try:
232	        return OrderArgs(price=price, size=size, side=side, token_id=token_id)
233	    except TypeError:
234	        return OrderArgs(price=price, size=size, side=side, tokenID=token_id)
235	
236	
237	def _sdk_side(side: str) -> Any:
238	    normalized = side.upper()
239	    try:
240	        from py_clob_client.order_builder.constants import BUY, SELL
241	
242	        return BUY if normalized == "BUY" else SELL
243	    except ImportError:  # pragma: no cover - handled before live use.
244	        return normalized
245	
246	
247	def _sdk_order_type(order_type: str) -> Any:
248	    normalized = order_type.upper()
249	    try:
250	        from py_clob_client.clob_types import OrderType
251	    except ImportError:  # pragma: no cover - handled before live use.
252	        return normalized
253	    return getattr(OrderType, normalized, normalized)
254	
255	
256	def _order_from_payload(
257	    payload: dict[str, Any],
258	    *,
259	    fallback_order_id: str | None = None,
260	    fallback_status: str | None = None,
261	) -> PolymarketLiveOrder:
262	    order_id = _str_first(
263	        payload,
264	        "external_order_id",
265	        "orderID",
266	        "order_id",
267	        "id",
268	    ) or fallback_order_id
269	    if not order_id:
270	        raise RuntimeError("Polymarket order response missing order id")
271	    status = _str_first(payload, "status", "state") or fallback_status or "SUBMITTED"
272	    return PolymarketLiveOrder(
273	        external_order_id=order_id,
274	        status=str(status),
275	        filled_size=_decimal_first(
276	            payload,
277	            "filled_size",
278	            "filledSize",
279	            "filledAmount",
280	            "filled_amount",
281	            "matchedAmount",
282	        ),
283	        average_price=_decimal_first_or_none(
284	            payload,
285	            "average_price",
286	            "averagePrice",
287	            "avgPrice",
288	            "price",
289	        ),
290	        raw_payload=payload,
291	    )
292	
293	
294	def _payload_dict(value: Any) -> dict[str, Any]:
295	    if isinstance(value, dict):
296	        return value
297	    if hasattr(value, "model_dump"):
298	        dumped = value.model_dump()
299	        return dumped if isinstance(dumped, dict) else {"value": dumped}
300	    if hasattr(value, "dict"):
301	        dumped = value.dict()
302	        return dumped if isinstance(dumped, dict) else {"value": dumped}
303	    if hasattr(value, "__dict__"):
304	        return dict(value.__dict__)
305	    raise RuntimeError(
306	        f"unexpected Polymarket SDK payload type: {type(value).__name__}"
307	    )
308	
309	
310	def _str_first(payload: dict[str, Any], *keys: str) -> str | None:
311	    for key in keys:
312	        value = payload.get(key)
313	        if value is not None and str(value).strip():
314	            return str(value).strip()
315	    return None
316	
317	
318	def _decimal_first(payload: dict[str, Any], *keys: str) -> Decimal:
319	    return _decimal_first_or_none(payload, *keys) or Decimal("0")
320	
321	
322	def _decimal_first_or_none(payload: dict[str, Any], *keys: str) -> Decimal | None:
323	    for key in keys:
324	        value = payload.get(key)
325	        if value is None:
326	            continue
327	        try:
328	            return _decimal(value)
329	        except ValueError:
330	            continue
331	    return None
332	
333	
334	def _decimal(value: Any) -> Decimal:
335	    try:
336	        return Decimal(str(value))
337	    except (InvalidOperation, ValueError, TypeError) as exc:
338	        raise ValueError(f"not a decimal value: {value!r}") from exc
339

1	"""Live Kalshi order adapter for Forecasts."""
2	
3	from __future__ import annotations
4	
5	import json
6	import os
7	from dataclasses import dataclass, field
8	from decimal import ROUND_HALF_UP, Decimal, InvalidOperation
9	from typing import Any, Literal
10	
11	from noosphere.forecasts._kalshi_client import KalshiAPIError, KalshiClient
12	
13	
14	@dataclass(frozen=True)
15	class KalshiLiveOrder:
16	    external_order_id: str
17	    status: str
18	    filled_size: Decimal = Decimal("0")
19	    average_price: Decimal | None = None
20	    raw_payload: dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)
21	
22	
23	class KalshiLiveClient(KalshiClient):
24	    @classmethod
25	    def from_env(cls) -> KalshiLiveClient:
26	        private_key = (
27	            os.getenv("KALSHI_API_PRIVATE_KEY", "").replace("\\n", "\n").strip()
28	            or os.getenv("KALSHI_PRIVATE_KEY_PEM", "").replace("\\n", "\n").strip()
29	        )
30	        return cls(
31	            base=os.getenv(
32	                "KALSHI_API_BASE",
33	                "https://api.elections.kalshi.com/trade-api/v2",
34	            ),
35	            key_id=os.getenv("KALSHI_API_KEY_ID", "").strip(),
36	            private_key_pem=private_key,
37	        )
38	
39	    async def place_order(
40	        self,
41	        ticker: str,
42	        side: Literal["YES", "NO", "yes", "no"],
43	        count: int,
44	        price: Decimal | float | str,
45	        order_type: str,
46	        client_order_id: str,
47	    ) -> KalshiLiveOrder:
48	        side_value = side.lower()
49	        if side_value not in {"yes", "no"}:
50	            raise ValueError("Kalshi side must be yes or no")
51	        body: dict[str, Any] = {
52	            "ticker": ticker,
53	            "side": side_value,
54	            "action": "buy",
55	            "client_order_id": client_order_id,
56	            "count": int(count),
57	            f"{side_value}_price": _price_cents(price),
58	            "time_in_force": _time_in_force(order_type),
59	        }
60	        payload = await self._request_json("POST", "/portfolio/orders", json_body=body)
61	        return _order_from_payload(payload)
62	
63	    async def cancel_order(self, order_id: str) -> KalshiLiveOrder:
64	        payload = await self._request_json("DELETE", f"/portfolio/orders/{order_id}")
65	        return _order_from_payload(
66	            payload,
67	            fallback_order_id=order_id,
68	            fallback_status="CANCELLED",
69	        )
70	
71	    async def get_order(self, order_id: str) -> KalshiLiveOrder:
72	        payload = await self._request_json("GET", f"/portfolio/orders/{order_id}")
73	        return _order_from_payload(payload, fallback_order_id=order_id)
74	
75	    async def _request_json(
76	        self,
77	        method: str,
78	        path: str,
79	        *,
80	        json_body: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
81	    ) -> Any:
82	        client = self._ensure_client()
83	        headers = self._signed_headers(method, path)
84	        headers["Content-Type"] = "application/json"
85	        content = (
86	            json.dumps(json_body).encode("utf-8")
87	            if json_body is not None
88	            else None
89	        )
90	        response = await client.request(
91	            method,
92	            f"{self._base}{path}",
93	            headers=headers,
94	            content=content,
95	        )

"""Live Kalshi order adapter for Forecasts."""

from __future__ import annotations

import json
import os
from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from decimal import ROUND_HALF_UP, Decimal, InvalidOperation
from typing import Any, Literal

from noosphere.forecasts._kalshi_client import KalshiAPIError, KalshiClient


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class KalshiLiveOrder:
    external_order_id: str
    status: str
    filled_size: Decimal = Decimal("0")
    average_price: Decimal | None = None
    raw_payload: dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)


class KalshiLiveClient(KalshiClient):
    @classmethod
    def from_env(cls) -> KalshiLiveClient:
        private_key = (
            os.getenv("KALSHI_API_PRIVATE_KEY", "").replace("\\n", "\n").strip()
            or os.getenv("KALSHI_PRIVATE_KEY_PEM", "").replace("\\n", "\n").strip()
        )
        return cls(
            base=os.getenv(
                "KALSHI_API_BASE",
                "https://api.elections.kalshi.com/trade-api/v2",
            ),
            key_id=os.getenv("KALSHI_API_KEY_ID", "").strip(),
            private_key_pem=private_key,
        )

    async def place_order(
        self,
        ticker: str,
        side: Literal["YES", "NO", "yes", "no"],
        count: int,
        price: Decimal | float | str,
        order_type: str,
        client_order_id: str,
    ) -> KalshiLiveOrder:
        side_value = side.lower()
        if side_value not in {"yes", "no"}:
            raise ValueError("Kalshi side must be yes or no")
        body: dict[str, Any] = {
            "ticker": ticker,
            "side": side_value,
            "action": "buy",
            "client_order_id": client_order_id,
            "count": int(count),
            f"{side_value}_price": _price_cents(price),
            "time_in_force": _time_in_force(order_type),
        }
        payload = await self._request_json("POST", "/portfolio/orders", json_body=body)
        return _order_from_payload(payload)

    async def cancel_order(self, order_id: str) -> KalshiLiveOrder:
        payload = await self._request_json("DELETE", f"/portfolio/orders/{order_id}")
        return _order_from_payload(
            payload,
            fallback_order_id=order_id,
            fallback_status="CANCELLED",
        )

    async def get_order(self, order_id: str) -> KalshiLiveOrder:
        payload = await self._request_json("GET", f"/portfolio/orders/{order_id}")
        return _order_from_payload(payload, fallback_order_id=order_id)

    async def _request_json(
        self,
        method: str,
        path: str,
        *,
        json_body: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
    ) -> Any:
        client = self._ensure_client()
        headers = self._signed_headers(method, path)
        headers["Content-Type"] = "application/json"
        content = (
            json.dumps(json_body).encode("utf-8")
            if json_body is not None
            else None
        )
        response = await client.request(
            method,
            f"{self._base}{path}",
            headers=headers,
            content=content,
        )
        if response.status_code == 404:
            raise KalshiAPIError(404, response.text)
        if 400 <= response.status_code:
            raise KalshiAPIError(response.status_code, response.text)
        if not response.content:

"""Standing Forecasts scheduler loop."""

from __future__ import annotations

import argparse
import asyncio
import json
import os
import signal
import time
from dataclasses import asdict, dataclass
from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone
from decimal import Decimal
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any, Awaitable, Callable, Sequence

from sqlalchemy.engine import make_url
from sqlmodel import asc, desc, select

from noosphere.config import get_settings
from noosphere.currents.budget import BudgetExhausted
from noosphere.articles.triggers import (
    DEFAULT_WEEKLY_ARTICLE_CAP,
    dispatch_triggered_articles,
)
from noosphere.coherence.recalibration import (
    ResolvedRow as RecalibrationResolvedRow,
    fit_and_persist_per_domain as fit_and_persist_recalibration_models,
)
from noosphere.evaluation.public_calibration import (
    build_manifest as build_public_calibration_manifest,
    default_manifest_path as default_public_calibration_path,
    fetch_rows_from_db as fetch_public_calibration_rows,
    publish_manifest as publish_public_calibration_manifest,
    revalidate_public_page as revalidate_public_calibration_page,
)
from noosphere.forecasts.budget import PersistentHourlyBudgetGuard
from noosphere.forecasts.config import KalshiConfig, PolymarketConfig
from noosphere.forecasts.decision_metrics import EDGE_LIVE_THRESHOLD
from noosphere.forecasts.forecast_generator import ForecastOutcome, generate_forecast
from noosphere.forecasts.kalshi_ingestor import ingest_once as ingest_kalshi_once
from noosphere.forecasts.paper_bet_engine import (
    DEFAULT_INITIAL_BALANCE,
    PaperBetConfig,
    evaluate_and_stake,
    settle_paper_bets_for_market,
)
from noosphere.forecasts.polymarket_ingestor import ingest_once as ingest_polymarket_once
from noosphere.forecasts.resolution_tracker import poll_all_open
from noosphere.forecasts.status import status_path_from_env, utc_now_iso, write_status
from noosphere.models import (
    ForecastBet,
    ForecastBetMode,
    ForecastBetStatus,
    ForecastExchange,
    ForecastMarket,
    ForecastMarketStatus,
    ForecastPortfolioState,
    ForecastPrediction,
    ForecastPredictionStatus,
)
from noosphere.observability import configure_logging, get_logger
from noosphere.store import Store


RECENT_PREDICTION_WINDOW = timedelta(hours=24)
SHUTDOWN_GRACE_SECONDS = 30.0
DEFAULT_BUDGET_PATH = Path("/var/lib/theseus/forecasts_budget.json")
DEFAULT_PUBLIC_CALIBRATION_INTERVAL_S = 24 * 60 * 60  # nightly
DEFAULT_RECALIBRATION_INTERVAL_S = 7 * 24 * 60 * 60  # weekly

log = get_logger(__name__)


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class SchedulerConfig:
    ingest_interval_s: int = 900
    generate_interval_s: int = 600
    metric_scan_interval_s: int = 420
    resolution_poll_interval_s: int = 300

1	"""Persistent Forecasts scheduler status for readiness checks."""
2	
3	from __future__ import annotations
4	
5	import json
6	import os
7	import tempfile
8	from dataclasses import asdict, is_dataclass
9	from datetime import datetime, timezone
10	from decimal import Decimal
11	from pathlib import Path
12	from typing import Any
13	
14	
15	STATUS_FILENAME = "forecasts_status.json"
16	DEFAULT_STATUS_PATH = Path("/var/lib/theseus") / STATUS_FILENAME
17	
18	
19	def status_path_from_env() -> Path:
20	    explicit = os.environ.get("FORECASTS_STATUS_PATH", "").strip()
21	    if explicit:
22	        return Path(explicit)
23	    legacy = os.environ.get("FORECASTS_RESOLUTION_STATUS_PATH", "").strip()
24	    if legacy:
25	        return Path(legacy)
26	    data_dir = os.environ.get("NOOSPHERE_DATA_DIR", "").strip()
27	    if data_dir:
28	        return Path(data_dir) / STATUS_FILENAME
29	    return DEFAULT_STATUS_PATH
30	
31	
32	def utc_now_iso() -> str:
33	    return datetime.now(timezone.utc).replace(microsecond=0).isoformat().replace(
34	        "+00:00",
35	        "Z",
36	    )
37	
38	
39	def parse_utc_iso(value: object) -> datetime | None:
40	    if not isinstance(value, str) or not value.strip():
41	        return None
42	    raw = value.strip()
43	    if raw.endswith("Z"):
44	        raw = f"{raw[:-1]}+00:00"
45	    try:
46	        parsed = datetime.fromisoformat(raw)
47	    except ValueError:
48	        return None
49	    if parsed.tzinfo is None:
50	        return parsed.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc)
51	    return parsed.astimezone(timezone.utc)
52	
53	
54	def _payload(report: Any) -> dict[str, Any]:
55	    if is_dataclass(report):
56	        return asdict(report)
57	    if isinstance(report, dict):
58	        return dict(report)
59	    raise TypeError(f"unsupported status report type: {type(report).__name__}")
60	
61	
62	def _json_default(value: Any) -> Any:
63	    if isinstance(value, datetime):
64	        return value.astimezone(timezone.utc).replace(microsecond=0).isoformat().replace(
65	            "+00:00",
66	            "Z",
67	        )
68	    if isinstance(value, Decimal):
69	        return float(value)
70	    raise TypeError(f"object of type {type(value).__name__} is not JSON serializable")
71	
72	
73	def write_status(report: Any, path: Path | None = None) -> Path:
74	    target = Path(path) if path is not None else status_path_from_env()
75	    target.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
76	    payload = _payload(report)
77	
78	    fd, tmp_name = tempfile.mkstemp(
79	        prefix=f".{target.name}.",
80	        suffix=".tmp",
81	        dir=str(target.parent),
82	        text=True,
83	    )
84	    tmp_path = Path(tmp_name)
85	    try:
86	        with os.fdopen(fd, "w", encoding="utf-8") as fh:
87	            json.dump(payload, fh, indent=2, sort_keys=True, default=_json_default)
88	            fh.write("\n")
89	            fh.flush()
90	            os.fsync(fh.fileno())
91	        os.replace(tmp_path, target)
92	    finally:
93	        if tmp_path.exists():
94	            tmp_path.unlink()
95	    return target
96	
97	
98	def read_status(path: Path | None = None) -> dict[str, Any]:
99	    target = Path(path) if path is not None else status_path_from_env()
100	    return json.loads(target.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
101

input.prompt:
I need a thorough survey of the existing forecasts-operator backend API surface and configuration so I can add a "founder-alpha setup" read-only status endpoint. Search the repo at /Users/michaelquintin/Desktop/Theseus.

Find and report (with file paths and line numbers):

1. The FastAPI/Python operator routes under `/v1/operator/...` — look in `current_events_api/` and `noosphere/`. List each route (path, method, what it returns). I especially want to see anything tagged operator/founder.
2. Existing forecasts-operator GET endpoints (live-bets, portfolio summary, etc.) so I know the conventions: HMAC verification, founder permission check, response shape, where they read scheduler `status.json`.
3. Where the forecasts scheduler status file is read on the API side. Look for `read_status`, `status_path_from_env`, `forecasts_status.json`.
4. Existing TS frontend usage of operator routes (`src/app/(authed)/api/forecasts/operator/...` and `src/lib/forecastsOperatorApi.ts`) — especially any read-only GET status routes already wired.
5. Where existing env docs live for forecasts/Polymarket/Kalshi. Search for files mentioning `POLYMARKET_PRIVATE_KEY`, `KALSHI_API_KEY_ID`, `FORECASTS_LIVE_TRADING_ENABLED`, `FORECASTS_MAX_STAKE_USD`. Report any README/docs/markdown files that already document env vars.
6. Any existing "secrets" / "credentials" / "envelope encryption" infrastructure in repo (search for `kms`, `encrypt`, `secret_store`, `nacl`, `Fernet`, `cryptography`).
7. Does `noosphere/forecasts/safety.py` have a public helper that returns a GateContext dict suitable for surfacing? Confirm what `current_trading_mode()` returns.
8. List founder permission helpers in TS — `canWrite`, `getFounder`, `requireTenantContext`, etc. Where they live.

Keep the report under 600 words. Use bullet lists. Include exact paths.

80	def compute_operator_hmac(
81	    secret: str,
82	    *,
83	    timestamp: str,
84	    path: str,
85	    body: bytes,
86	) -> str:
87	    body_hash = hashlib.sha256(body).hexdigest()
88	    message = "\n".join([timestamp, path, body_hash]).encode("utf-8")
89	    return hmac.new(secret.encode("utf-8"), message, hashlib.sha256).hexdigest()
90

92	async def require_operator(request: Request) -> None:
93	    secret = os.getenv("FORECASTS_OPERATOR_SECRET", "").strip()
94	    if not secret:
95	        raise HTTPException(status.HTTP_401_UNAUTHORIZED, "operator_secret_not_configured")
96	
97	    supplied = request.headers.get(OPERATOR_HEADER, "").strip()
98	    timestamp = request.headers.get(OPERATOR_TIMESTAMP_HEADER, "").strip()
99	    if not supplied or not timestamp:
100	        raise HTTPException(status.HTTP_401_UNAUTHORIZED, "operator_auth_required")
101	
102	    try:
103	        supplied_time = float(timestamp)
104	    except ValueError as exc:
105	        raise HTTPException(status.HTTP_401_UNAUTHORIZED, "operator_timestamp_invalid") from exc
106	    if abs(time.time() - supplied_time) > OPERATOR_REPLAY_WINDOW_SECONDS:
107	        raise HTTPException(status.HTTP_401_UNAUTHORIZED, "operator_timestamp_stale")
108	
109	    body = await request.body()
110	    expected = compute_operator_hmac(
111	        secret,
112	        timestamp=timestamp,
113	        path=request.url.path,
114	        body=body,
115	    )
116	    supplied_digest = supplied.removeprefix("sha256=").strip()
117	    if not hmac.compare_digest(expected, supplied_digest):
118	        raise HTTPException(status.HTTP_401_UNAUTHORIZED, "operator_auth_invalid")
119	
120	
121	def _require_csrf(csrf_token: str) -> None:
122	    expected = os.getenv("FORECASTS_OPERATOR_CSRF_TOKEN", "").strip()
123	    if not csrf_token.strip():
124	        raise HTTPException(status.HTTP_403_FORBIDDEN, "csrf_required")
125	    if expected and not hmac.compare_digest(expected, csrf_token):
126	        raise HTTPException(status.HTTP_403_FORBIDDEN, "csrf_invalid")

129	def _live_enabled() -> bool:
130	    return os.getenv("FORECASTS_LIVE_TRADING_ENABLED", "").strip().lower() == "true"
131	
132	
133	def _enum_value(value: object) -> str:
134	    return str(getattr(value, "value", value))

137	def _org_filter() -> str | None:
138	    return (
139	        os.environ.get("FORECASTS_ORG_ID")
140	        or os.environ.get("FORECASTS_INGEST_ORG_ID")
141	        or None
142	    )

145	def _organization_id(store: Store) -> str:
146	    explicit = _org_filter()
147	    if explicit:
148	        return explicit
149	    with store.session() as db:
150	        state = db.exec(select(ForecastPortfolioState).limit(1)).first()
151	        if state is not None:
152	            return state.organization_id
153	        prediction = db.exec(select(ForecastPrediction).limit(1)).first()
154	        if prediction is not None:
155	            return prediction.organization_id
156	    return "default"
157

159	def _state_payload(store: Store, organization_id: str) -> dict[str, object]:
160	    state = store.get_portfolio_state(organization_id)
161	    return {
162	        "organization_id": organization_id,
163	        "kill_switch_engaged": bool(state.kill_switch_engaged) if state else False,
164	        "kill_switch_reason": state.kill_switch_reason if state else None,
165	        "updated_at": state.updated_at.isoformat() if state else None,
166	    }

169	def _bet_event_name(bet: ForecastBet) -> str:
170	    status_value = _enum_value(bet.status)
171	    if status_value == ForecastBetStatus.SUBMITTED.value:
172	        return "bet.submitted"
173	    if status_value == ForecastBetStatus.FILLED.value:
174	        return "bet.filled"
175	    if status_value == ForecastBetStatus.CANCELLED.value:
176	        return "bet.cancelled"
177	    if status_value == ForecastBetStatus.FAILED.value:
178	        return "bet.failed"
179	    return "bet.submitted"

182	@router.post(
183	    "/forecasts/{prediction_id}/authorize-live",
184	    dependencies=[Depends(require_operator)],
185	)
186	def authorize_live(
187	    prediction_id: str,
188	    body: OperatorAuthorizeRequest,
189	    store: Annotated[Store, Depends(get_store)],
190	) -> PublicForecast:
191	    _require_csrf(body.csrf_token)
192	    if not _live_enabled():
193	        raise HTTPException(status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST, "live_trading_disabled")
194	
195	    timestamp = datetime.now(UTC)
196	    with store.session() as db:
197	        prediction = db.get(ForecastPrediction, prediction_id)
198	        if prediction is None or _enum_value(prediction.status) != ForecastPredictionStatus.PUBLISHED.value:
199	            raise HTTPException(status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, "forecast_not_found")
200	        prediction.live_authorized_at = timestamp
201	        prediction.live_authorized_by = body.operator_id
202	        prediction.updated_at = timestamp
203	        db.add(prediction)
204	        db.commit()
205	
206	    refreshed = store.get_forecast_prediction(prediction_id)
207	    assert refreshed is not None
208	    return public_forecast_from_store(store, refreshed)

211	@router.post(
212	    "/forecasts/{prediction_id}/bets/{bet_id}/confirm",
213	    dependencies=[Depends(require_operator)],
214	)
215	async def confirm_live_bet(
216	    prediction_id: str,
217	    bet_id: str,
218	    body: OperatorConfirmRequest,
219	    store: Annotated[Store, Depends(get_store)],
220	    bus: Annotated[OpinionBus, Depends(get_bus)],
221	) -> OperatorBet:
222	    _require_csrf(body.csrf_token)
223	    timestamp = datetime.now(UTC)
224	    with store.session() as db:
225	        prediction = db.get(ForecastPrediction, prediction_id)
226	        bet = db.get(ForecastBet, bet_id)
227	        if prediction is None or _enum_value(prediction.status) != ForecastPredictionStatus.PUBLISHED.value:
228	            raise HTTPException(status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, "forecast_not_found")
229	        if bet is None or bet.prediction_id != prediction_id:
230	            raise HTTPException(status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, "bet_not_found")
231	        if _enum_value(bet.mode) != ForecastBetMode.LIVE.value:
232	            raise HTTPException(status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST, "not_a_live_bet")
233	        if _enum_value(bet.status) == ForecastBetStatus.AUTHORIZED.value:
234	            bet.status = ForecastBetStatus.CONFIRMED
235	            bet.confirmed_at = timestamp
236	        elif _enum_value(bet.status) == ForecastBetStatus.CONFIRMED.value and bet.confirmed_at is None:
237	            bet.confirmed_at = timestamp
238	        if bet.live_authorized_at is None and prediction.live_authorized_at is not None:
239	            bet.live_authorized_at = prediction.live_authorized_at
240	        db.add(bet)
241	        db.commit()
242	
243	    try:
244	        submitted = await submit_live_bet(store, bet_id, operator_id=body.operator_id)
245	    except GateFailure as exc:
246	        raise HTTPException(
247	            status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
248	            {"gate_code": exc.code, "detail": exc.detail},
249	        ) from exc
250	    except KeyError as exc:
251	        raise HTTPException(status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, "bet_not_found") from exc
252	    except ValueError as exc:
253	        raise HTTPException(status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST, str(exc)) from exc
254	
255	    payload = operator_bet(submitted)
256	    await bus.publish_operator(_bet_event_name(submitted), payload.model_dump(mode="json"))
257	    return payload

331	@router.get("/live-bets", dependencies=[Depends(require_operator)])
332	def list_live_bets(
333	    store: Annotated[Store, Depends(get_store)],
334	    limit: int = Query(default=50, ge=1, le=100),
335	    offset: int = Query(default=0, ge=0),
336	) -> dict[str, list[OperatorBet] | int | None]:
337	    organization_id = _organization_id(store)
338	    with store.session() as db:
339	        rows = list(
340	            db.exec(
341	                select(ForecastBet)
342	                .where(ForecastBet.organization_id == organization_id)
343	                .where(ForecastBet.mode == ForecastBetMode.LIVE.value)
344	                .order_by(desc(ForecastBet.created_at))
345	                .offset(offset)
346	                .limit(limit + 1)
347	            ).all()
348	        )
349	    next_offset = offset + limit if len(rows) > limit else None
350	    return {
351	        "items": [operator_bet(row) for row in rows[:limit]],
352	        "next_offset": next_offset,
353	    }

356	@router.get("/stream", dependencies=[Depends(require_operator)])
357	def stream_operator(
358	    bus: Annotated[OpinionBus, Depends(get_bus)],
359	) -> StreamingResponse:
360	    async def frames() -> AsyncIterator[bytes]:
361	        async for message in bus.subscribe_operator():
362	            event = str(message.get("event") or message.get("kind") or "operator.event")
363	            payload = message.get("data", message.get("payload", {}))
364	            yield forecast_sse_frame(event, payload)
365	
366	    return forecast_sse_response(with_forecast_heartbeats(frames()))

1	"""Live-trading safety gates for Forecasts.
2	
3	Live submission is intentionally a narrow, explicit path. Failing a gate is
4	normal control flow: the attempt is blocked and logged, but the emergency kill
5	switch is not engaged unless an auto-engagement detector fires separately.
6	"""
7	
8	from __future__ import annotations
9	
10	import os
11	from collections.abc import Sequence
12	from dataclasses import dataclass
13	from datetime import UTC, datetime
14	from decimal import Decimal, InvalidOperation
15	from typing import Any, Literal
16	
17	from sqlmodel import desc, select
18	
19	from noosphere.models import ForecastPortfolioState, ForecastResolution
20	from noosphere.observability import get_logger
21	
22	log = get_logger(__name__)
23	
24	GateFailureCode = Literal[
25	    "DISABLED",

46	@dataclass(frozen=True)
47	class GateContext:
48	    live_trading_enabled: bool
49	    polymarket_configured: bool
50	    kalshi_configured: bool
51	    max_stake_usd: float
52	    max_daily_loss_usd: float
53	    kill_switch_engaged: bool
54	    daily_loss_usd: float

58	@dataclass(frozen=True)
59	class GateResult:
60	    gate_name: str
61	    passed: bool
62	    reason: str
63	    code: GateFailureCode | None = None

66	if "GateFailure" not in globals():
67	
68	    class GateFailure(Exception):
69	        code: GateFailureCode
70	        detail: str
71

75	            super().__init__(f"{code}: {detail}")

78	def gate_context_from_env(state: ForecastPortfolioState | None) -> GateContext:
79	    """Build the live gate context from environment and portfolio state."""
80	
81	    return GateContext(
82	        live_trading_enabled=(
83	            os.getenv("FORECASTS_LIVE_TRADING_ENABLED", "").strip().lower()
84	            == "true"
85	        ),
86	        polymarket_configured=bool(os.getenv("POLYMARKET_PRIVATE_KEY", "").strip()),
87	        kalshi_configured=bool(
88	            os.getenv("KALSHI_API_KEY_ID", "").strip()
89	            and _kalshi_private_key_from_env()
90	        ),
91	        max_stake_usd=_env_float("FORECASTS_MAX_STAKE_USD", 0.0),
92	        max_daily_loss_usd=_env_float("FORECASTS_MAX_DAILY_LOSS_USD", 0.0),
93	        kill_switch_engaged=bool(state.kill_switch_engaged) if state else False,
94	        daily_loss_usd=float(state.daily_loss_usd) if state else 0.0,
95	        live_balance_usd=float(state.live_balance_usd or Decimal("0.00"))
96	        if state
97	        else 0.0,
98	    )

101	def current_trading_mode() -> str:
102	    """Return the import-time trading posture for structured startup logging."""
103	
104	    live_enabled = (
105	        os.getenv("FORECASTS_LIVE_TRADING_ENABLED", "").strip().lower() == "true"
106	    )
107	    if not live_enabled:
108	        return "PAPER_ONLY"
109	    kalshi_configured = (
110	        os.getenv("KALSHI_API_KEY_ID", "").strip()
111	        and _kalshi_private_key_from_env()
112	    )
113	    if not (os.getenv("POLYMARKET_PRIVATE_KEY", "").strip() or kalshi_configured):
114	        return "LIVE_DISABLED_NO_CREDENTIALS"
115	    return "LIVE_ENABLED_AWAITING_AUTHORIZATION"

118	def check_all_gates(*, prediction: Any, bet: Any, ctx: GateContext) -> None:
119	    """Raises GateFailure on the first failing gate.
120	
121	    The order is the safety contract order. Do not reorder these checks without
122	    changing the contract and tests at the same time.
123	    """
124	
125	    for result in evaluate_gate_results(prediction=prediction, bet=bet, ctx=ctx):
126	        if result.passed:
127	            continue
128	        exc = GateFailure(result.code or "NOT_CONFIGURED", result.reason)
129	        _log_gate_failure(exc, prediction=prediction, bet=bet)
130	        raise exc
131	
132	
133	def evaluate_gate_results(*, prediction: Any, bet: Any, ctx: GateContext) -> list[GateResult]:
134	    """Return all eight live-trading gate results in the check_all_gates order."""
135	
136	    results: list[GateResult] = []
137	
138	    results.append(
139	        GateResult(
140	            gate_name="live_trading_enabled",
141	            passed=ctx.live_trading_enabled,
142	            reason=(
143	                "FORECASTS_LIVE_TRADING_ENABLED=true"
144	                if ctx.live_trading_enabled
145	                else "live trading env flag is not true"
146	            ),
147	            code=None if ctx.live_trading_enabled else "DISABLED",
148	        )
149	    )
150	
151	    exchange = _enum_value(getattr(bet, "exchange", ""))
152	    if exchange == "POLYMARKET":
153	        configured = ctx.polymarket_configured
154	    elif exchange == "KALSHI":
155	        configured = ctx.kalshi_configured
156	    else:
157	        configured = False
158	    results.append(
159	        GateResult(
160	            gate_name="exchange_credentials_configured",
161	            passed=configured,
162	            reason=(
163	                f"live credentials are configured for exchange={exchange}"
164	                if configured
165	                else "live credentials are not configured for "
166	                f"exchange={exchange or '<unset>'}"
167	            ),
168	            code=None if configured else "NOT_CONFIGURED",
169	        )
170	    )
171	
172	    authorized = getattr(prediction, "live_authorized_at", None) is not None
173	    results.append(
174	        GateResult(
175	            gate_name="prediction_live_authorized",
176	            passed=authorized,
177	            reason=(
178	                "parent prediction has live_authorized_at"
179	                if authorized
180	                else "parent prediction has no live_authorized_at timestamp"
181	            ),
182	            code=None if authorized else "NOT_AUTHORIZED",
183	        )
184	    )
185	
186	    confirmed = _enum_value(getattr(bet, "status", "")) == "CONFIRMED" and getattr(
187	        bet,
188	        "confirmed_at",
189	        None,
190	    ) is not None
191	    results.append(
192	        GateResult(
193	            gate_name="operator_confirmation",
194	            passed=confirmed,
195	            reason=(
196	                "bet completed per-bet operator confirmation"
197	                if confirmed
198	                else "bet has not completed the per-bet operator confirmation"
199	            ),
200	            code=None if confirmed else "NOT_CONFIRMED",
201	        )
202	    )
203	
204	    stake = _decimal(getattr(bet, "stake_usd", Decimal("0.00")))
205	    max_stake = _decimal(ctx.max_stake_usd)
206	    stake_ok = stake <= max_stake
207	    results.append(
208	        GateResult(
209	            gate_name="stake_ceiling",
210	            passed=stake_ok,
211	            reason=(
212	                f"stake_usd={stake} is within max_stake_usd={max_stake}"
213	                if stake_ok
214	                else f"stake_usd={stake} exceeds max_stake_usd={max_stake}"
215	            ),
216	            code=None if stake_ok else "STAKE_OVER_CEILING",
217	        )
218	    )
219	
220	    daily_loss = _decimal(ctx.daily_loss_usd)
221	    max_daily_loss = _decimal(ctx.max_daily_loss_usd)
222	    daily_loss_ok = daily_loss <= max_daily_loss
223	    results.append(
224	        GateResult(
225	            gate_name="daily_loss_ceiling",
226	            passed=daily_loss_ok,
227	            reason=(
228	                f"daily_loss_usd={daily_loss} is within max_daily_loss_usd={max_daily_loss}"
229	                if daily_loss_ok
230	                else f"daily_loss_usd={daily_loss} exceeds max_daily_loss_usd={max_daily_loss}"
231	            ),
232	            code=None if daily_loss_ok else "DAILY_LOSS_OVER_CEILING",
233	        )
234	    )
235	
236	    results.append(
237	        GateResult(
238	            gate_name="kill_switch_clear",
239	            passed=not ctx.kill_switch_engaged,
240	            reason=(
241	                "portfolio kill switch is clear"
242	                if not ctx.kill_switch_engaged
243	                else "portfolio kill switch is engaged"
244	            ),
245	            code=None if not ctx.kill_switch_engaged else "KILL_SWITCH_ENGAGED",
246	        )
247	    )
248	
249	    live_balance = _decimal(ctx.live_balance_usd)
250	    balance_ok = live_balance >= stake
251	    results.append(
252	        GateResult(
253	            gate_name="sufficient_live_balance",
254	            passed=balance_ok,
255	            reason=(
256	                f"live_balance_usd={live_balance} covers stake_usd={stake}"
257	                if balance_ok
258	                else f"live_balance_usd={live_balance} is below stake_usd={stake}"
259	            ),
260	            code=None if balance_ok else "INSUFFICIENT_BALANCE",
261	        )
262	    )
263	
264	    return results
265

267	def engage_kill_switch(
268	    store: Any,
269	    organization_id: str,
270	    *,
271	    reason: str,
272	    engaged_at: datetime | None = None,
273	) -> None:
274	    timestamp = _aware_utc(engaged_at or datetime.now(UTC))
275	    with store.session() as session:
276	        state = _portfolio_state(session, organization_id, now=timestamp)
277	        state.kill_switch_engaged = True
278	        state.kill_switch_reason = reason
279	        state.updated_at = timestamp
280	        session.add(state)
281	        session.commit()
282	    log.warning(
283	        "forecast_live_kill_switch_engaged",
284	        organization_id=organization_id,
285	        reason=reason,
286	        engaged_at=timestamp.isoformat(),
287	    )
288	
289	
290	def disengage_kill_switch(
291	    store: Any,
292	    organization_id: str,
293	    *,
294	    operator_id: str,
295	    note: str = "",
296	) -> None:
297	    if not operator_id or not operator_id.strip():
298	        raise ValueError("operator_id is required to disengage the kill switch")
299	    if len(note.strip()) < 20:
300	        raise ValueError("kill switch disengagement note must be at least 20 chars")
301	    timestamp = datetime.now(UTC)
302	    with store.session() as session:
303	        state = _portfolio_state(session, organization_id, now=timestamp)
304	        state.kill_switch_engaged = False
305	        state.kill_switch_reason = None
306	        state.updated_at = timestamp
307	        session.add(state)
308	        session.commit()
309	    log.warning(
310	        "forecast_live_kill_switch_disengaged",
311	        organization_id=organization_id,
312	        operator_id=operator_id,
313	        note=note.strip(),
314	        disengaged_at=timestamp.isoformat(),
315	    )

318	def daily_loss_auto_engagement_reason(
319	    state: ForecastPortfolioState | None,
320	    *,
321	    threshold_usd: Decimal | None = None,
322	) -> KillSwitchReason | None:
323	    if state is None:
324	        return None
325	    threshold = (
326	        threshold_usd
327	        if threshold_usd is not None
328	        else _env_decimal("FORECASTS_KILL_SWITCH_AUTO_THRESHOLD_USD", Decimal("0"))
329	    )
330	    if threshold <= Decimal("0"):
331	        return None
332	    return (
333	        "DAILY_LOSS_THRESHOLD"
334	        if Decimal(state.daily_loss_usd) >= threshold
335	        else None
336	    )
337	
338	
339	def exchange_error_streak_reason(
340	    organization_id: str,
341	    *,
342	    threshold: int = 3,
343	) -> KillSwitchReason | None:
344	    return (
345	        "EXCHANGE_ERROR_STREAK"
346	        if _EXCHANGE_ERROR_STREAKS.get(organization_id, 0) >= threshold
347	        else None
348	    )
349	
350	
351	def calibration_degraded_reason(
352	    resolutions: Sequence[ForecastResolution],
353	    *,
354	    window: int = 50,
355	    max_mean_brier: float = 0.30,
356	) -> KillSwitchReason | None:
357	    scored = [r for r in resolutions[:window] if r.brier_score is not None]
358	    if len(scored) < window:
359	        return None
360	    mean_brier = sum(float(r.brier_score) for r in scored) / len(scored)
361	    return "CALIBRATION_DEGRADED" if mean_brier > max_mean_brier else None
362	
363	
364	def maybe_engage_daily_loss_kill_switch(
365	    store: Any,
366	    organization_id: str,
367	    *,
368	    state: ForecastPortfolioState | None = None,
369	) -> bool:
370	    state = state or store.get_portfolio_state(organization_id)
371	    reason = daily_loss_auto_engagement_reason(state)
372	    if reason is None:
373	        return False
374	    engage_kill_switch(store, organization_id, reason=reason)
375	    return True
376	
377	
378	def maybe_engage_calibration_kill_switch(store: Any, organization_id: str) -> bool:
379	    with store.session() as session:
380	        resolutions = list(
381	            session.exec(
382	                select(ForecastResolution)
383	                .where(ForecastResolution.brier_score.is_not(None))
384	                .order_by(desc(ForecastResolution.resolved_at))
385	                .limit(50)
386	            ).all()
387	        )
388	    reason = calibration_degraded_reason(resolutions)
389	    if reason is None:
390	        return False
391	    engage_kill_switch(store, organization_id, reason=reason)
392	    return True
